task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the dividend summary or 'My Portfolio' to view the dividend amounts
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock interface shows the dividend records for the portfolio, displaying the individual dividend amounts.

task_completion.description: Record the calculated total dividend amount
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '110.25' (or a value within 0.1 tolerance) is visible being written, either in a text editor or via a terminal command.

task_completion.description: Save the file as dividend_total.txt in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the file name as 'dividend_total.txt' in the correct path, a save dialog confirms the path, or a terminal command shows the output being redirected to /home/ga/Documents/dividend_total.txt.

integrity.description: The agent used the JStock GUI to view the dividends
integrity.visual_evidence: The JStock application is actively used to view the portfolio dividends, rather than the agent reading backend CSV files or databases directly via terminal.

integrity.description: The agent viewed the individual dividend amounts before recording the total
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent looking at the dividend records in JStock before the final sum of 110.25 is produced, proving it didn't just copy a hardcoded answer.

integrity.description: The agent actually created and saved the file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent executes a save action in a text editor or runs a command that writes to the file, rather than just typing the number on screen without saving.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected total dividend amount is 110.25 (tolerance 0.1). The dividends in the portfolio are from AAPL (45.0), MSFT (22.5), JNJ (30.0), and O (12.75). The final output must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Documents/dividend_total.txt.
